basic_details.job_title: PJTSAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Research Fellow and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow and Field Investigator
basic_details.short_information: The Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) has officially announced the Senior Research Fellow and Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website. Candidates who hold M.Sc. in Agriculture / Horticulture with specialization in Entomology / Pathology / Genetic & Plant Breeding / Seed Technology / any other discipline, or Diploma in Agriculture / Seed Technology / Horticulture can attend the walk-in interview on 23 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and attend the walk-in intervi

qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): M.Sc. in Agriculture / Horticulture, specialization in Entomology / Pathology / Genetic & Plant Breeding / Seed Technology / any other discipline. Field Investigator: Diploma in Agriculture / Seed Technology / Horticulture

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for PJTSAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 23 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the PJTSAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Senior Research Fellow (SRF) and Field Investigator. There is one vacancy for each post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Field Investigator post is a Diploma in Agriculture, Seed Technology, or Horticulture.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 19,500 to Rs. 37,000 per month, plus 9% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the PJTSAU recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these PJTSAU jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for PJTSAU recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the PJTSAU office in Mudhole, Telangana, with the pincode 504102.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Does PJTSAU offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation is not explicitly provided in the summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for details.
